name: Gamble the Silverware
timing: *Must* be played at end of game.
description:
If the placed Objective Marker is Active: **Gain 1 Victory Point**.
If you *Won* this game: **Gain 2 Machination Points**.
If you *Lost* this game: **Lose 2 Machination Points**.
extraDescription: Before deployment place one Objective Markers 18" away from your deployment table Edge.
